qa_pairs.question: What might cause the error message 'Error: No valid host was found. There are not enough hosts available.' when launching a virtual machine instance?
qa_pairs.answer: This error can occur if you manually select an Availability Zone when trying to launch the instance, instead of using the default 'Any Availability Zone' option.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user resolve the 'No valid host was found. There are not enough hosts available.' error if it's caused by an Availability Zone selection?
qa_pairs.answer: To resolve this error, you should set the Availability Zone back to 'Any Availability Zone' when configuring the instance details.
